items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario 'Deposit collection vs full payment', but the evidence provided does not confirm this functionality. While there are successful steps related to bookings, none explicitly demonstrate the behavior of deposit collection versus full payment. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide concrete evidence of this specific scenario being tested or validated.
